blended.narrative: Cranmore Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 479 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 57°F.
